title: Options Fundamentals — Quantitative Analyst Skill Registry
description: Knowledge base for quantitative options analysis: greeks, strategies, indicators, terminology.

delta.name: Delta (Δ)
delta.interpretation: Rate of option price change per ₹1 spot move. ATM ≈ 0.5, deep OTM ≈ 0.1.
delta.use: Iron Butterfly: sell ATM (delta ~0.5). Buy wings at 0.15-0.20 delta. Net delta should approach zero.
delta.formula: Δ = N(d₁) for calls, N(d₁) - 1 for puts

gamma.name: Gamma (Γ)
gamma.interpretation: Rate of delta change per ₹1 spot move. High near expiry.
gamma.use: Daily P&L swing ≈ γ × (ΔS)² ÷ 2 × lot_size. Used to calibrate stop-loss for delta-neutral positions.

theta.name: Theta (Θ)
theta.range: negative for buyers, positive for sellers
theta.interpretation: Time decay per day. ATM options decay fastest in final week.
theta.use: Iron Butterfly/condor are theta-positive. Near expiry (~3 days), theta accelerates — best entry window.

vega.name: Vega (ν)
vega.interpretation: Option price change per 1% VIX change.
vega.use: Entry at high VIX → VIX crush → vega profit. Entry at low VIX → VIX spike → vega loss.

iron_butterfly.name: Iron Butterfly
iron_butterfly.structure: Sell ATM CE + ATM PE, buy OTM CE + OTM PE at ±wing
iron_butterfly.profit_mechanism: Premium decay if spot stays near ATM strike
iron_butterfly.greeks_profile: Theta-positive, delta-neutral at entry, gamma-negative near expiry
iron_butterfly.best_conditions: VIX 12-18, 3 days to expiry, SuperTrend direction confirmed, no event day

iron_condor.name: Iron Condor
iron_condor.structure: Sell OTM CE + OTM PE, buy further OTM CE + further OTM PE
iron_condor.profit_mechanism: Premium decay if spot stays within range
iron_condor.greeks_profile: Theta-positive, delta-neutral, lower gamma than Iron Butterfly
iron_condor.best_conditions: VIX 15-22, range-bound market, no breakout catalyst expected

credit_spread.name: Credit Spread (Put/Call)
credit_spread.regime: Trending Bear (Put spread) / Trending Bull (Call spread)
credit_spread.structure: Sell OTM option, buy further OTM (directional bet)
credit_spread.profit_mechanism: Premium decay + directional move in your favor
credit_spread.best_conditions: VIX > 18, event day, trend confirmed by SuperTrend + ADX

adx.name: Average Directional Index
adx.use: Primary regime detector. ADX<25 = options sellers safe (range-bound). ADX>35 = credit spreads preferred.

supertrend.name: SuperTrend
supertrend.use: Confirms ADX direction. Bearish ST + high ADX = sell calls. Bullish ST + high ADX = sell puts.

rsi.name: Relative Strength Index
rsi.use: Overbought + high ADX = Iron Fly reversion trade. Oversold + bearish ST = avoid bullish plays.

atr.name: Average True Range
atr.use: Expected daily range ≈ ATR × 1.5. Calibrate wing width: wings should exceed daily range.

vwap.name: Volume-Weighted Average Price
vwap.use: Intraday bias: spot > VWAP = bullish bias. Spot < VWAP = bearish bias. Trade WITH VWAP.

stop_loss.principle: SL must exceed daily expected P&L swing × 1.5

margin_utilization.span_calculator: Use broker span_calculator for pre-trade margin estimation

entry_window.reason: Opening auction volatility settles. ORB (opening range breakout) confirmed or rejected.
entry_window.exit_time: On target hit, SL hit, or 14:35 IST (hard close)

terminology.vix: India VIX — fear gauge. Daily expected move ≈ VIX% × spot ÷ √252. VIX>20 = caution.
terminology.atm_strike: Round(current_spot / 50) × 50. The strike closest to spot.
terminology.strike_grid: NIFTY: 50-point grid. SENSEX: 100-point grid. BANKNIFTY: 100-point grid.
terminology.wing_width: Distance in points from ATM sell to OTM buy (hedge). Wider = safer, more capital. Narrow = cheaper, higher breach risk.
terminology.expiry_selection: Weekly expiry (Thursday) at 3 DTE = peak theta. 0 DTE = high gamma risk, avoid.
terminology.lot_size: NIFTY = 75, SENSEX = 10, BANKNIFTY = 30. Always multiply by lot_size for margin.
terminology.premium_decay: Theta accelerates in final 5 days. Best entry: Tuesday/Wednesday for Thursday expiry.
terminology.bid_ask_spread: Liquid strikes have spread ≤ ₹2-3. Wide spread (>₹10) = illiquid, avoid.
